description_long: This is a modern wooden entertainment cabinet with a rich brown finish, featuring a flat rectangular base and two main sections of differing heights. The taller section supports a large flat-screen television and has two open shelves beneath it, suitable for media devices. The lower section consists of two wide drawers or doors with a light gray finish, providing concealed storage. On the left side, there are open cubby spaces, possibly for wine bottles or decorative items. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a combination of open and closed storage. The cabinet is likely constructed from wood with some metal or plastic hardware for the drawers or doors.
description: A modern wooden entertainment cabinet with open shelves, concealed storage, and a mounted flat-screen TV. It features a rich brown finish with light gray drawer fronts and open cubby spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV, two open shelves, two large gray drawers or doors, and open cubby spaces on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, the thin profile of the TV, and the layered height of the two main sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of both sections and the TV, with no visible storage openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side of the lower section and the thin TV profile.
